Article Title: BCCI makes major IPL 2026 schedule change - Here's what's new
Article Text:
Image credit: BCCI/IPL

Watch Sherfane Rutherford reacts after crucial innings in IPL 2026 Sherfane Rutherford reacts after crucial innings in IPL 2026

IPL schedule: What has changed?

IPL 2026: Points table scenario

NEW DELHI: The Board of Control for Cricket in India (BCCI) on Monday revised the IPL 2026 schedule, swapping the dates and venues for matches between Gujarat Titans and Chennai Super Kings due to upcoming municipal corporation elections in Gujarat on April 26.Elections are set to be held not only in Ahmedabad but also across several cities, including Surat, Vadodara, Rajkot, Bhavnagar, Jamnagar, Karamsad-Anand, Gandhidham, Nadiad, Navsari, Porbandar, Mehsana, Morbi, Vapi and Surendranagar. The counting of votes is scheduled for April 28.As per the revised schedule announced by BCCI secretary Devajit Saikia, the afternoon fixture between Gujarat Titans and Chennai Super Kings, initially slated for April 26 at the Narendra Modi Stadium, will now be played in Chennai at the MA Chidambaram Stadium on the same date. The match will continue to start at 3:30 PM IST.As a result, the return fixture - originally scheduled for May 21 in Chennai - will now be hosted in Ahmedabad, while retaining its 7:30 PM IST start time.The rest of the IPL 2026 schedule remains unchanged as the tournament moves into its crucial mid-season phase.“The change has been necessitated in view of the municipal corporation elections in Ahmedabad and other parts of Gujarat scheduled on April 26, 2026,” the BCCI said in a release.Five-time champions Chennai Super Kings will next face Kolkata Knight Riders in Chennai on Tuesday, having opened their account with a 23-run win over Delhi Capitals.Gujarat Titans, meanwhile, have collected four points from four matches and are placed fifth on the table. They will next take on Kolkata Knight Riders in Ahmedabad on Friday.
Article Summary: The board of control for cricket in india (bcci) on monday revised the ipl 2026 schedule. Match between gujarat titans and chennai super kings will now be played in chennai. This is due to upcoming municipal corporation elections in gujarat on april 26. The return fixture - originally scheduled for may 21 in chennai - will now being hosted in ahmedabad.

Article Title: Sykkuno Controversy: Sykkuno controversy deepens as NamiKitsunami shares shocking meetup story after HemomaIVT cheating allegations go viral
Article Text:
Sykkuno (Image Via Getty)

Sykkuno controversy grows after NamiKitsunami shares details of their meetup experience







Sykkuno is facing serious backlash online after multiple allegations about his personal behavior surfaced. The situation started when a VTuber named HemomaIVT accused him of misleading her and being involved with multiple women at the same time. Since then, more people have come forward with their own experiences, making the controversy bigger.As the discussion spread across X, another VTuber, NamiKitsunami, shared her own story about meeting Sykkuno in person. Her post added a new layer to the situation. She described how a casual meetup turned uncomfortable for her, and how she later felt relieved that she did not get more involved.NamiKitsunami explained that Sykkuno first contacted her after seeing her on VRChat. According to her, he would message her randomly and often try to meet during events. She said he later visited her city during a gaming tournament and invited her to join a group outing.Sharing her experience on X, she wrote, “Oh my god. Thank god I turned him down. Sykkuno reached out to me after seeing me in VRChat one day and always messaged out of nowhere or tried to meet up with me at conventions. He bought me steam games.He showed up in my city for a league tournament and invited me out to a group event, paid for me to play and all my drinks, and we planned to go back out… so he ubered us to my apartment to store all the prizes we won. ”She added that after spending time at a gaming bar, Sykkuno tried to impress her by offering financial help. She said, “Dumb on my part but I had been drinking we ended up going to a bar with vintage arcade games to play more and as a joke told me if I got the high score he’d pay my rent (he knew I was struggling) after some more drinks we had to go back to my apartment to pick up the prizes. He wanted to stay and play games or watch a show with me. . I didn’t feel comfortable and politely thanked him for the night.”According to Nami, things became more uncomfortable when she decided to end the night. She shared, “Sykkuno grabbed me by the waist and pulled me in against his body and asked in a flirty tone ‘so, do you want something’. I was really nervous but I just told him no sorry but thank you for the fun and to have a good night.”She also said she was not aware that he had a girlfriend at the time. Looking back, she said she felt thankful for trusting her instincts and staying safe.So far, Sykkuno has not publicly responded in detail to these specific claims. However, the situation continues to grow online as more users discuss the allegations and past interactions.
Article Summary: Sykkuno is facing serious backlash online after multiple allegations about his personal behavior surfaced. The situation started when a vtuber named hemomaivt accused him of misleading her and being involved with multiple women at the same time. Since then, more people have come forward with their own experiences, making the controversy bigger.

Article Title: Alex Ovechkin: Alex Ovechkin nears the final chapter as NHL's greatest goal scorer faces an uncertain future
Article Text:
Washington Capitals captain Alex Ovechkin shared his plans regarding his future in the National Hockey League (Image via AFP Photo)

Capitals star Alex Ovechkin hints at possible final chapter amid retirement speculations

Watch Alex Ovechkin is focused on Caps’ playoff push, will decide future in offseason | SportsCenter Alex Ovechkin is focused on Caps’ playoff push, will decide future in offseason | SportsCenter

Alex Ovechkin, who is widely regarded as the greatest goal scorer in NHL history, is probably approaching the final chapter of his legendary career, as uncertainty looms around him and his future with the Washington Capitals.Several reports are suggesting that Ovechkin might play his last match tonight against the Columbus Blue Jackets, as both teams are going to play their last match of the season. Though this has not been confirmed yet, neither by the Washington Capitals star nor the team.Over the years, Ovechkin has cemented his status as one of hockey's all-time greats. The 40-year-old forward, who broke Wayne Gretzky’s historic record in 2025 with his 895th career goal, has scored beyond 920 goals, making him the NHL’s all-time leading scorer. NHL star Alex Ovechkin is set to feature in what could be a significant regular-season finale, amid the retirement speculation, as the Washington Capitals take on the Columbus Blue Jackets, marking the end of the 2025–26 NHL campaign for both sides.The veteran forward, widely considered one of the greatest goal scorers in NHL history, is expected to appear against the Capitals, potentially making this one of his final appearances if he opts to step away after the season.However, he has yet to announce the decision.Speaking on Alex Ovechkin’s journey, Capitals coach Spencer Carbury said, "His durability through his career … when it's all said and done, and you dissect how he was able to be so successful a goal-scorer and NHL player, that is a big part of it is the longevity and the durability.”He further stated, "Him being able to consistently be in the lineup every single night is a big part of why he's been able to reach the goal record and be so consistent for so many years."As per reports, Ovechkin was seen during the Capitals' morning skate at Nationwide Arena, but he won't speak to reporters until after the game. Besides, he recently added that his decision about retiring from the NHL or returning for another season with the Capitals won't be made until the offseason.Moreover, according to the NHL, this season Ovechkin has scored 32 goals, 31 assists, gaining 63 points in 81 games played in total. He has broken Wayne Gretzky's record by scoring his 895th goal on April 6, 2025, against the New York Islanders. He added 32 more goals to his career ledger by leading the Capitals again to increase his total career goals to 929 in 1,572 games.
Article Summary: Washington capitals captain alex ovechkin shared his plans regarding his future in the national hockey league. The 40-year-old forward, widely regarded as the greatest goal scorer in nhl history, is probably approaching the final chapter of his legendary career.

Article Title: Srh Vs Rr: IPL match today, SRH vs RR: Predicted playing XI, head-to-head, pitch report, Hyderabad weather update
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and Yashasvi Jaiswal (ANI Photo)

Watch Yashasvi Jaiswal reveals RR dressing room mood after third straight win Yashasvi Jaiswal reveals RR dressing room mood after third straight win

SRH vs RR Head-to-Head

Total matches played: 21

Sunrisers Hyderabad: 12

Rajasthan Royals: 9

SRH vs RR Today IPL Match: Pitch Report

SRH vs RR: Predicted Playing 11s

Sunrisers Hyderabad predicted XI:

Rajasthan Royals predicted XI:

SRH vs RR IPL Match: Hyderabad Weather Update

SRH vs RR: Live Streaming details

SRH vs RR team squads

Sunrisers Hyderabad:

Rajasthan Royals:

Rampaging Rajasthan Royals will aim to cement their top spot when they take on an inconsistent Sunrisers Hyderabad in Monday’s IPL clash.The Royals have been the team to beat this season, winning all four matches with authority. Their dominance has been driven by a destructive opening pair in Yashasvi Jaiswal and young Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, who have consistently dismantled attacks in the Powerplay. Dhruv Jurel has provided stability at No. 3, while skipper Riyan Parag’s middle order remains largely untested.The biggest turnaround, however, has come in their bowling. Jofra Archer and Nandre Burger have been incisive up front, with Ravi Bishnoi leading the wickets tally in the middle overs. The addition of Ravindra Jadeja has further strengthened their spin attack.In contrast, SRH have struggled for consistency, losing three of four games. Their hopes hinge on explosive starts from Travis Head and Abhishek Sharma, while Heinrich Klaasen has carried the batting with 184 runs.With bowling issues and the absence of Pat Cummins, SRH face an uphill task and will need a complete performance to halt RR’s momentum.The Hyderabad venue, Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, remains one of the toughest grounds for bowlers in the country. Pitch No. 3, set to host this clash, is a flat, mixed-soil surface where spin has been expensive, conceding at a run rate of 10.91.Pace fares slightly better at 9.41, which could prompt both sides to lean more on their seam options.Conditions will add to the challenge. It promises to be a hot, humid evening, with temperatures hovering in the mid 30s Celsius but feeling significantly warmer due to the high humidity.Abhishek Sharma, Travis Head, Ishan Kishan (c & wk), Heinrich Klaasen, Salil Arora, Aniket Verma, Nitish Kumar Reddy, Harsh Dubey, Shivang Kumar, Harshal Patel, Eshan MalingaImpact Sub: Liam Livingstone/Praful HingeYashasvi Jaiswal, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Dhruv Jurel (wk), Riyan Parag (c), Shimron Hetmyer, Donovan Ferreira, Ravindra Jadeja, Jofra Archer, Nandre Burger, Sandeep Sharma, Ravi BishnoiImpact Sub: Brijesh SharmaMostly sunny and very warm conditions are expected, with the temperature peaking at around 40°C. Skies will remain clear through the night, with the mercury dropping to a low of 26°C.It will be a hot day in Hyderabad with virtually no chance of rain. Conditions are likely to stay mostly clear during match hours, with temperatures easing from around 37°C at toss time to nearly 32°C by the end of play.The SRH vs RR clash will be held at the Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium in Hyderabad, with the match set to begin at 7:30 PM IST. The game will be broadcast on the Star Sports Network, while live streaming will be available on JioHotstar.Ishan Kishan (c & wk), Abhishek Sharma, Amit Kumar, Salil Arora, Brydon Carse, Pat Cummins, Harsh Dubey, Krains Fuletra, Travis Head, Praful Hinge, Heinrich Klaasen, Liam Livingstone, Eshan Malinga, Kamindu Mendis, Nitish Kumar Reddy, Harshal Patel, David Payne, Sakib Hussain, Shivam Mavi, Shivang Kumar, Ravichandran Smaran, Onkar Tarmale, Jaydev Unadkat, Aniket Verma, Zeeshan Ansari.Riyan Parag (c), Dhruv Jurel, Donovan Ferreira, Lhuan-Dre Pretorius, Ravi Singh, Aman Perala, Shimron Hetmyer, Shubham Dubey, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Yashasvi Jaiswal, Ravindra Jadeja, Sam Curran, Adam Milne, Brijesh Sharma, Jofra Archer, Kuldeep Sen, Kwena Maphaka, Nandre Burger, Ravi Bishnoi and Sandeep Sharma.
Article Summary: Rajasthan royals take on sunrisers hyderabad in ipl clash. Rajasthan have won all four matches so far this season. Royals have been driven by destructive opening pair yashasvi jaiswal and vaibhav sooryavanshi. Srh have struggled for consistency, losing three of four games.

Article Title: Ipl 2026 Schedule: IPL 2026 schedule this week (April 6 to April 12): Full list of matches, dates, timings, venues and results
Article Text:
RCB and MI players

IPL 2026 schedule

this week (6-12 April):

Watch Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Full schedule of IPL 2026 this week (6-12 April): Matches, dates, timings, venues & results

Date Day Home Team Visiting Team Time (IST) Venue Result April 6 Monday KKR PBKS 7:30 PM Kolkata Washed out April 7 Tuesday RR MI 7:30 PM Guwahati RR win by 27 runs April 8 Wednesday DC GT 7:30 PM Delhi GT win by 1 run April 9 Thursday KKR LSG 7:30 PM Kolkata LSG win by 3 wickets April 10 Friday RR RCB 7:30 PM Guwahati RR win by 6 wickets April 11 Saturday PBKS SRH 3:30 PM New Chandigarh PBKS win by 6 wickets April 11 Saturday CSK DC 7:30 PM Chennai CSK win by 23 runs April 12 Sunday LSG GT 3:30 PM Lucknow GT win by 7 wickets April 12 Sunday MI RCB 7:30 PM Mumbai RCB win by 18 runs

After nine thrilling matches last week, a trend is beginning to emerge on which teams are on a roll and which are still struggling to settle into the new season. So far, 15 matches have been played in the new season of the IPL , and four teams have already set the early marker in the race for the playoffs.With four wins in four matches, Rajasthan Royals sit at the top of the points table. Punjab Kings are at second after two wins and a no result due to rain. They are followed by defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru, Delhi Capitals and Lucknow Super Giants, who have two wins each so far. Meanwhile, Chennai Super Kings and Kolkata Knight Riders are two winless teams in IPL 2026.With a win each, Sunrisers Hyderabad, Mumbai Indians, and Gujarat Titans have opened their account in the standings and will look to challenge the top four in coming fixtures.The ongoing IPL season has already witnessed multiple weather disruptions across the country. The KKR vs PBKS clash in Kolkata was washed out, while the RR vs MI encounter had to be curtailed to just 11 overs per side in which Rajasthan Royals outclassed Mumbai Indians by 27 runs. And on Wednesday, GT held their nerves to beat hosts DC by one run in a last-ball thriller.KKR lost their 3rd match in a row after Mukul Choudhary pulled off a record breaking chase for LSG in the last-ball thriller.Rajasthan Royals and Royal Challengers Bengaluru, face off in Guwahati on Friday.The weekend double-headers will see Punjab Kings take on Sunrisers Hyderabad and Chennai Super Kings face Delhi Capitals on Saturday, followed by Lucknow Super Giants vs Gujarat Titans and Mumbai Indians vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru on Sunday.There is likely to be plenty of shuffling in the points table this week.
Article Summary: Rajasthan royals and royal challengers bengaluru, face off in guwahati on friday. Chennai super kings and kolkata knight riders are two winless teams in ipl 2026. Sunrisers hyderabad, mumbai indians, and gujarat titans have opened their account in the standings.

Article Title: Tavis Kelce Taylor Swift Wedding: Travis Kelce reportedly pulls out all the stops for Taylor Swift weeks ahead of their grand July wedding
Article Text:
Travis Kelce reportedly pulls out all the stops for Taylor Swift weeks ahead of their grand July wedding.(Image via Getty Images)

Travis Kelce goes out of his way to make Taylor Swift feel loved before they step into a new chapter in their lives



All about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s multi million dollar wedding in New York City



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have had to deal with a lot of negative rumors about their high profile wedding as many even thought it might be postponed after the star player’s poor run on the field in the last season.But with their wedding date being set for 3rd July, Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are just days away from tying the knot and the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player’s focus seems to be on his future wife.As per The Sun, a source has revealed that Travis Kelce will also reportedly participate in the show that Taylor Swift’s best friends, pop star and entrepreneur Selena Gomez, and supermodel Gigi Hadid are planning for her as a part of her bachelorette celebrations.A source said, “He wants to do everything he can to ensure she has the best wedding day ever and to build lasting memories…”The Kansas City Chiefs’ star player and popular tight end Travis Kelce might also recreate his look from the time he made an appearance at the Eras Tour in London, 2024.But that’s not all; as per The Sun, a second source has revealed that Travis Kelce has reportedly planned to gift Taylor Swift elborate flower arrangements around 100 days before they tie the knot in a lavish ceremony.As per sources, each delivery will be more expensive and elaborate as their wedding date nears.However, in public, both Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce remain strictly private about their wedding plans as they continue to send “Save the Date” cards to their high profile guests.As per Page Six, a source has revealed that Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift are all set to reportedly tie the knot on 3rd July in New York City.Both of them have already started sending out invitations as guests have been reportedly told to “hold off the weekend” as they plan a multi day lavish wedding in New York.As per Page Six, Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have strictly banned mobile phones at their wedding to maintain full privacy.
Article Summary: Travis kelce reportedly pulls out all the stops for taylor swift weeks ahead of their grand july wedding. Travis kelce will also reportedly participate in the show that taylor swift’s best friends, pop star and entrepreneur selena gomez, and supermodel gigi hadid are planning for her as a part of her bachelorette celebrations.

Article Title: Vikings Quarterback Trade Rumors: Minnesota Vikings $15M quarterback tied to Matthew Stafford’s Los Angeles Rams
Article Text:
Minnesota Vikings $15M quarterback tied to Matthew Stafford’s Los Angeles Rams (Image via Getty: Matthew Stafford and Minnesota Vikings logo)

NFL Trade Rumors : Vikings QB J.J. McCarthy linked to Matthew Stafford led Rams

Jimmy Johnson draft trade value for Minnesota QB is mid fourth round selection

Los Angeles coach Sean McVay could turn around J.J. McCarthy’s career as he did with Baker Mayfield

With Kyler Murray and Carson Wentz in the Minnesota Vikings, the J.J. McCarthy chapter may be coming to an end. USA TODAY’s Jack McKassey predicts that the 23-year-old quarterback will be traded on draft day.Minnesota signed two veteran signal-callers this offseason with starting experience. McCarthy will be expected to compete for the starter role with Murray. Wentz will be expected to battle for the QB2 role.McKassey suggests Minnesota should move on from its 2024 draft pick and trade him for more draft picks. ESPN’s Bill Barnwell suggests an interesting trade package for the Vikings:The Los Angeles Rams acquire the 18th overall first-round pick, the 97th overall third-round pick, along with McCarthy, whereas Minnesota acquires the 13th overall first-round pick. Matthew Stafford is approaching 40, and the Rams need a long-term solution at QB. McCarthy could be turned around by great coaches like Sean McVay. And there’s more! Let’s find out, shall we?McCarthy was a CFP national champion and Rose Bowl Offensive MVP. He was listed as the Big Ten Quarterback of the Year in 2023. Come the 2024 NFL Draft, the Vikings picked him as their first-round, 10th overall pick. However, he could not shine there: missed his first NFL season due to a complete meniscus tear in his knee.He underwent surgery for it and landed on the injured reserve list. Sam Darnold took his spot then in 2024. Come the 2025 season, McCarthy was expected to return to his 2023 college football form:240 completions on 332 attempts for 2,991 passing yards and 22 touchdowns. He also clocked 202 rushing yards and three rushing touchdowns. He had just four interceptions. He led the Michigan Wolverines to a 15-0 record and won the National Championship against the Alabama Crimson Tide.But what happened? He was again sidelined for seven games due to injuries [a high ankle sprain, a concussion, and a small hairline fracture in his throwing hand]. Carson Wentz took his spot. In the 10 games that McCarthy played, he recorded 140 completions on 243 attempts for 1,632 passing yards and 11 touchdowns.He had 12 interceptions and was sacked 27 times. Anyhow, expecting a full season from him may be difficult. Barnwell says, “It might be tough to count on him [McCarthy] making it through a full 17-game season, let alone playing well in the process.”For this matter, Los Angeles makes perfect sense. There is a veteran QB there, Matthew Stafford, who is known to play through broken ribs [dedication is beyond the roof in such players].The veteran could handle the fort while the developing rookie could take his own time to acclimate to the gridiron. McCarthy has NFL experience, but 2026 would be his third season, and he has only played in 10 games.Barnwell reports that, according to Jimmy Johnson’s chart, the Vikings QB’s trade value is 112th pick in a typical draft. That is a selection in the middle of the fourth round. “And the Rams would be on the hook for $6.6M over the next two years, which isn’t much for a developmental backup QB,” the analyst wrote.According to Spotrac, the Michigan alum signed a four-year, $21M contract with Minnesota, including a $12M signing bonus, $21M in guaranteed money, and a $5M average annual income.In 2026, he is scheduled to earn a $1M base salary and a $1.7M roster bonus while carrying a $5.9M cap hit and a $6.3M dead cap value. His total career earnings over one season are $15M [through 2026].The ESPN analyst suggests that “great coaches have a habit of revitalizing quarterbacks who didn’t look like NFL-caliber starters.”In 2022, Tampa Bay Buccaneers QB Baker Mayfield played for the Rams. Sean McVay turned around Mayfield’s career after he had been declared a bust in Cleveland and Carolina.Mayfield played just five games for Los Angeles in 2022, and he recorded 82 completions on 142 attempts for 850 yards and four touchdowns. He had two interceptions. But acquired an 86.4 passer rating.So, would McVay do the same with McCarthy? Remains to be seen…
Article Summary: Minnesota vikings $15m quarterback tied to matthew stafford’s los angeles rams. Mccarthy has nfl experience, but 2026 would be his third season, and he has only played in 10 games. Mccarthy was a cfp national champion and rose bowl offensive mvp. Baker mayfield played just five games for los angeles in 2022.

Article Title: Leon Draisaitl Injury Update: Edmonton Oilers' Leon Draisaitl latest injury update boosts NHL playoff hopes despite uncertain return timeline
Article Text:
Leon Draisaitl injury update (Update: Getty Images)

Leon Draisaitl of Edmonton Oilers injury update before the next NHL game



The Edmonton Oilers were given some good news when Leon Draisaitl made a comeback to regular training following his injury in the recent past. Having the German forward on the ice has boosted morale in the squad days before the commencement of the NHL playoffs.The positive development notwithstanding, it is still unclear how he can be expected back. Head coach Kris Knoblauch has affirmed that the team was taking a measured course where Draisaitl would undergo a thorough fitness regimen before he could resume in competitive play, and in particular, they made sure to postpone the commencement of high-stakes games.Response: Leon Draisaitl is on the right track towards recovery, but will not probably appear in the next NHL game.The Edmonton Oilers forward attended a practice session, and this marked a definite improvement towards his condition. Nonetheless, the management of his team has shown that he will not be able to play the next game, which might be against the Colorado Avalanche, just in case.Kris Knoblauch pointed out that it is long-term fitness, not short-term gain, that matters. Though pre-assessments had it that Draisaitl would be back by Game 1 of the Stanley Cup Playoffs, the player himself indicated he would rest the first few games, should the need arise.Zach Hyman also became part of the practice, and this contributed to a friendly environment surrounding the team.The role played by Draisaitl towards the Edmonton Oilers can hardly be overemphasised. Being among the top forwards in the league, he gives the team a lot of offensive power, as well as increasing their chances of making it to the playoffs.There have been reports on the inside that the injury is not regarded as a long-term injury; however, the franchise is taking some extraordinary precautions because of the vigor of the playoff hockey.In the future, the way the Oilers approach their strategy appears to be obvious - keep all the important players under control, keep the pace, and have stars such as Leon Draisaitl be ready to play the most significant matches of the season.
Article Summary: Edmonton oilers forward leon draisaitl has returned to regular training. Head coach kris knoblauch has affirmed that the team was taking a measured course. The german forward will undergo a thorough fitness regimen before he could resume in competitive play, and in particular, postpone the commencement of high-stakes games.

Article Title: Jerry Jones: Jerry Jones’ Dallas Cowboys tied to $101M Baltimore Ravens cornerback
Article Text:
(Image via Getty: Baltimore Ravens logo and Jerry Jones)

NFL Trade Rumors : Ravens CB Marlon Humphrey linked to Jerry Jones’ Dallas Cowboys

Baltimore cornerback tied to New York in trade package

Cowboys Wire’s K.D. Drummond suggests the Dallas Cowboys could adopt the Los Angeles Rams’ strategy and trade all their picks to bring back veterans.The Jerry Jones’ franchise has two draft picks: 114th in the fourth round and 180th in the fifth round. They could offer these two to the Baltimore Ravens to acquire veteran cornerback Marlon Humphrey in return.In the 2025 season, Humphrey recorded 68 total tackles (53 solo), four interceptions, 13 passes defended, and two forced fumbles.According to Pro Football Focus, his overall grade was 50.1, ranking him 105th out of 114 qualified cornerbacks that season. His PFF coverage grade was 43.8, which ranked him 112th among others, and his PFF run-defense grade was 78.9, which ranked him 9th among others.Dallas added Cobie Durant from Los Angeles, but he may have to compete for the starting role. Hypothetical situation: DaRon Bland and Shavon Revel Jr. are both not ready to take up a spot in the starting lineup. Neither of them may look like a long-term fit because of their natural inclinations.The new defensive coordinator, Christian Parker, may have a more zone-oriented scheme. And the duo might clash with Parker’s style.The DC may not want to put up with players who wouldn’t play his preferred style, especially the ones with injury concerns.Bland was placed on injured reserve in Dec. 2025 due to a persistent left foot fracture requiring surgery, whereas Revel suffered a torn ACL in Sept. 2024 during practice at East Carolina, which delayed his NFL debut until late 2025 as he was rehabbing.The DC may want to give up on in-house CBs and go with someone experienced. That’s where Ravens CB Marlon Humphrey comes into the picture: his playing style may match DC Christian Parker’s scheme; he has more zone ability than Bland and Revel.As for his contract, he is in the final year of his deal in 2026, and he is set to make $15M. He has three void years. His contract could be restructured or extended. Drummond suggests, “a simple extension adding a year at similar pay and two more voids could make him just a $4M blip on the team’s 2026 cap space.”Anyhow, Jerry Jones may have competition for Humphrey in the form of the New York Giants.FOX Sports’ Ralph Vacchiano suggests a trade package for Baltimore and the New York Giants. The Giants could acquire CB Marlon Humphrey; but it would cost them to lose their 2026 fourth-round 105th overall pick and 2027 conditional seventh-round pick.A lot of pressure may be put on Giants CB Greg Newsome. He was newly acquired from the Jacksonville Jaguars only this offseason. Veteran Paulson Adebo has suffered from injuries in the last two seasons. And the analyst calls Deonte Banks a bust.Whereas Humphrey is a 4X Pro Bowler and 2X All-Pro. He will be 30 years old and carries a $15M salary; he may not cost more than a Day 3 pick. His total career earnings over nine seasons amount to $101M.Anyhow, the analyst says Baltimore may be able to get by without him: veteran Chidobe Awuzie was re-signed this offseason, and 2024 draft pick Nate Wiggins is a developing starter. As for Humphrey, he may reunite with his former head coach John Harbaugh in New York.A blockbuster trade could happen if the Giants “entice” the Ravens with EDGE Kayvon Thibodeaux. In April 2025, Spotrac reported on X that New York had exercised a $14.75M 2026 fifth-year option salary for EDGE Kayvon Thibodeaux. This move locks him in at two years and $19.7M, fully guaranteed.Big Blue View’s Ed Valentine reports that the Giants would consider moving on from Thibodeaux if they were offered a Day 2 pick in return. John Harbaugh recently made it clear that everyone is tradeable.So, would Harbaugh’s team consider this trade deal? Or would it be Jerry Jones’ franchise? Only time will tell…
Article Summary: Marlon humphrey recorded 68 total tackles (53 solo), four interceptions, 13 passes defended, and two forced fumbles in the 2025 season. Humphrey is a 4x pro bowler and 2x all-pro. He is in the final year of his deal in 2026, and he is set to make $15m. His contract could be restructured or extended.

Article Title: “Three-against-one situation”: El Rubius opens up on being “targeted” in MrBeast’s viral $1M challenge
Article Text:
El Rubius reacted honestly after his elimination from MrBeast’s $1 million challenge, calling it “unfair” and claiming he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings. His response felt real and balanced, especially after MrBeast’s team later sent him a cake, softening the moment.

El Rubius reflects on a tough and “unfair” exit







El Rubius did not just walk away from MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge. He opened up. Soon after his elimination, the Spanish creator shared a raw reaction with fans, giving them a closer look at what the experience felt like from inside the game. It was not polished or carefully framed. It felt real, and that is exactly why it caught attention so quickly.The clip and his response have since fueled conversations across the streaming space. Some viewers believe intense competitions like this naturally lead to uneven situations. Others feel Rubius may have had a point about being singled out. Either way, his words have added a human layer to a challenge that many only saw as entertainment.Speaking through an Instagram Story, Rubius did not hide his frustration, but he also made sure to thank his supporters. He said, "Guys, I just got knocked out of the game. It was a bit of an unfair elimination, but hey, at least I managed to walk away with $50,000 for you all, which I’ve already distributed. It went to the mods, the subs, and the non-subs alike."He further added, "I’m happy, of course, though admittedly, it was incredibly tough.I wasn't really a fan of the challenge itself, either. But then again... it was basically a three-against-one situation the entire time. I mean, they were targeting me specifically the whole way through. I kept trying to go after RaKai, but, well, he actually just got eliminated in the end. So, at least justice was served for Abraham. Abraham, if you’re watching this, we were all rooting for you, and standing right there with you."His message carried mixed emotions. There was disappointment, yes, but also pride in how he handled things. Giving away his $50,000 winnings to his community stood out as a gesture that meant more than the result itself.He continued with another honest note, saying, "And in the end, karma finally caught up with that little punk. Sorry, I’m being a bit toxic right now, but let's just hope the MrBeast team doesn't see this! Guys, thank you all so much. Seriously, thank you for all the support and for just being there."He added, "Every time I asked for something in the chat or whatever it was, you guys were right there. You’re incredible. I’m a little disappointed in myself, personally, mostly for not performing better, but hey, I gave it my all, and we still walked away with $50,000, so we’ve got to look on the bright side. All right, guys, big hugs to all my brothers out there!"Interestingly, the story did not end with frustration. Later that day, Rubius revealed that MrBeast’s team had sent him a cake after his exit. It was a small gesture, but it shifted the mood. It showed that even in a high-pressure challenge, there is still room for respect.In the end, Rubius’ reaction felt honest and grounded. That is what stayed with people.
Article Summary: El rubius was eliminated from mrbeast's $1 million challenge. He called it "unfair" and said he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings.

Article Title: Ipl Ticket Scam: IPL craze costs techie Rs 1.46 lakh in fake RCB vs CSK ticket scam
Article Text:
Image credit: AI generated pic

Watch Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy

RCB register their second win

Poll Do you think the demand for IPL tickets is too high every season? Yes, it's excessive. No, it's just right.

NEW DELHI: IPL comes and the demand for tickets and passes go soaring up by the fans. The desperation to get inside the stadium to watch their favourite teams in action in the IPL go high and high. When the tickets get sold out, the demand gets too hig, and the cricket fans even ask for tickets in black. But for a 25-year-old techie the craze for IPL tickets for RCB vs CSK turned too costly and he was duped for a massive Rs. 1.46 lakh.The techie, a resident of B Narayanapura, fell into a trap by a post posted by a fraudster who posed himself as a ticket seller on Instagram.As per a report in Deccan Herald, the techie alleged in a complaint to Mahadevapura Police that an individual claiming to be Sumit Biswal promised he could arrange IPL tickets along with food coupons.As per the techie, Biswal was introduced him as a senior supervisor for ticket counter at M Chinnaswamy Stadium"He asked me to come near the stadium gate number 10, saying someone would deliver the tickets within minutes, and even sent an email confirmation to gain my trust," the complainant told Deccan Herald."Initially, I agreed to buy two tickets for Rs 3,700 each,but he kept asking for more money under various pretexts such as refundable security deposits, additional ID cards and food coupons.Trusting him, I made multiple payments - even using my mother’s bank account after exhausting my own limits—and ended up transferring around Rs 1.46 lakh," he added.Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s incisive spell of 3-41, coming after a marauding batting show from Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal, propelled Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) to a commanding 43-run victory over Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday.The contest saw RCB’s batting unit dismantle CSK’s attack with relentless hitting, as David’s 70 not out off just 25 balls and Patidar’s unbeaten 48 off only 19 balls provided for the late fireworks after Padikkal’s fluent 50 off 29 balls had set the tone for the daunting total.Their combined effort lifted RCB to a daunting 250/3, thus setting a new record for highest total in IPL 2026. In reply, CSK faltered under scoreboard pressure, with Sarfaraz Khan’s 50 off 24 balls and Prashant Veer’s 43 the lone acts of resistance amid a string of failures from the top order.Bhuvneshwar was at his disciplined best and even crossed the 200-mark in terms of wickets in IPL, with others also chipping in as CSK were bowled out for 207 in 19.4 overs. The comprehensive win also meant RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL’s history.
Article Summary: Royal challengers bengaluru (rcb) beat chennai super kings (csk) by 43 runs. Tim david, rajat patidar and devdutt padikkal all scored half-centuries. Rcb set a new record for highest total in ipl 2026 with 250/3.

Article Title: Shattering records and cultivating future stars
Article Text:
Mayura Shanbaug

Ashish Kumar Srivastava - MD and CEO of PNB MetLife

Sameer Bansal - Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife

Chirag Shetty - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

Satwiksairaj Rankireddy - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

Disclaimer: Content Produced by PNB Metlife

The 7th PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide, earning global recognition and fostering a culture of resilience and determination in aspiring badminton starsIn a spectacular display of badminton prowess and youthful enthusiasm, the 7th edition of the PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship (JBC) etched its name in the annals of sporting history. Celebrating a staggering participation of 8257 young champions from across India, the championship not only broke its own record set in 2022 but also clinched the title of the ‘Most kids participating in a Badminton Championship in multiple cities’ as recognised by the World Record Certification Agency (WRCA).The grand finale unfolded at the Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium in New Delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton. The event, graced by chief guests Chirag Shetty and Satwik Rankireddy, Asian Games Gold Medalists and JBC 2023 mentors, was a true celebration of the sport’s rising stars.The 10-city extravaganza, spanning the length and breadth of the country, showcased the unwavering commitment of PNB MetLife in nurturing young talents in the badminton arena. With participants exceeding 8200, it’s evident that the PNB MetLife JBC has become a beacon for aspiring shuttlers, highlighting the deep-seated passion for badminton among the diverse and talented youth of India.Beyond the glitz and glamour of the record-breaking numbers, the championship holds a special place in the hearts of those at the helm. Ashish Kumar Srivastava, MD and CEO of PNB MetLife, expressed pride in not just surpassing their own world record but also in contributing to India’s glory on the international badminton stage. The championship, he emphasized, is not merely a competition but a significant milestone in creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem.This edition of the JBC saw a strategic partnership with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, who served as mentors for the young talents. Sameer Bansal, Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife, acknowledged the pivotal role played by these champions in inspiring the next generation of badminton stars. The focus, according to Bansal, is on unleashing the latent potential of young shuttlers and preparing them for global excellence.The Delhi chapter of the championship witnessed some nail-biting action with over 1000 participants competing fiercely across various categories. From Ananya Talyan’s stellar performance in Girls Singles Under 9 to Divyansh Rawat’s triumph in Boys Singles Under 17, the young talents left no shuttle unturned in their quest for victory.The results from the Delhi leg not only showcased the raw talent but also highlighted the championship’s commitment to breaking barriers. The PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship is not just about records; it’s about fostering a culture of healthy living, determination, and resilience among the future champions of the sport.In the words of Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, the championship serves as an invaluable platform.---------------------------------------------------------------As we celebrate the successful culmination of the 7th edition of PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship , we take pride in surpassing our own world record for highest participation and for being recognized by World Record Certification Agency. Beyond the records, JBC represents a significant milestone in our mission to lay the groundwork for India’ s glory and success on the international badminton stage by creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem that nurtures champions at the grassroots levelThis year has been especially remarkable for PNB MetLife JBC as we joined hands with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy as JBC Mentors for the young talents associated with this tournament. They have played a pivotal role in inspiring young shuttlers to dream big and elevate their game and skills. We are eager for the next edition to unfold in our journey of unveiling the latent badminton potential across our nation and preparing them for global excellenceIt’s inspiring to witness the boundless talent and enthusiasm within our young athletes. My journey as JBC mentor has been incredibly fulfilling, as I got the opportunity to guide these budding champions and witness the journey of these young badminton stars. This championship is more than a competition; it is a platform that nurtures dreams, ignites aspirations, and, I believe, it is laying the foundation for future gold medalists in the makingTournaments like these serve as an invaluable platform for nurturing and harnessing the potential of our country’s young badminton stars. Witnessing the enthusiasm, passion, and skill displayed by these emerging shuttlers reinforces the belief that our country has an immense reservoir of talent. My association as a JBC mentor has been a source of immense pride, particularly given the role that the championship is playing in creating an incredible platform that is serving as a powerful catalyst, empowering young players and bolstering their confidence to become future champions
Article Summary: The 7th pnb metlife junior badminton championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide. The grand finale unfolded at the indira gandhi indoor stadium in new delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton.

Article Title: IPL Tickets Online: How to book IPL 2026 tickets online and offline, full IPL match schedule and other details
Article Text:
IPL 2026

IPL 2026 opening match

The phase will feature four double-headers, with afternoon matches starting at 3:30 PM IST and evening matches beginning at 7:30 PM IST. The first double-header of IPL 2026 takes place on April 4, when Delhi Capitals host Mumbai Indians at the Arun Jaitley Stadium in Delhi in the afternoon It will be followed by Gujarat Titans vs Rajasthan Royals at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad in the evening.

IPL 2026 home venues: Who is playing where



Royal Challengers Bengaluru will play five home matches in Bengaluru and two in Raipur.

Punjab Kings (PBKS) will host four matches at the PCA Stadium in New Chandigarh and three in Dharamshala.

Rajasthan Royals will begin their home campaign in Guwahati, where they will host Chennai Super Kings and Mumbai Indians. They will play four matches in Jaipur.

How to book IPL 2026 tickets online



Visit BookMyShow (bookmyshow.com), the District app (by Zomato), or your team's official website.

Search for the IPL 2026 match you want to attend using the date or team name.

Select your preferred seating category.

Choose your specific seats using the interactive stadium map.

Add the tickets to your cart and proceed to checkout.

Complete payment using a credit card, debit card, UPI, net banking, or digital wallet.

The ticket will be sent to your registered email address or mobile number.

How to buy IPL 2026 tickets offline



Visit the nearest authorised ticket counter at the stadium or a designated retail outlet. Locations are typically announced on the team’s official website and social media closer to the match.

Check availability for your preferred match and seating category at the counter.

Carry a valid photo ID — an Aadhaar card, PAN card, or passport will be accepted.

Choose your seats and confirm your selection with the ticketing staff.

Make your payment — cash, card, and digital wallets are generally accepted at most venues.

Collect your ticket on the spot after the transaction is complete.

The board has released the list of first 20 matches and a full schedule for the remainder of the tournament will be released once election dates are confirmed for three states that are set to hold State Assembly elections during this period.The 19th edition of IPL will begin with a blockbuster clash at the M. Article Title: PlayStation introduces “The Playerbase” program, giving selected fans a chance to be featured in Gran Turismo 7; here’s how
Article Text:
PC: PlayStation

The Playerbase programme by Sony Interactive Entertainment bringing fans into PlayStation Studios games



The Playerbase application and selection process for Gran Turismo 7 participation



The application process begins with an online submission through PlayStation’s official portal.

begins with an online submission through PlayStation’s official portal. Users sign in using their PlayStation account ID. They also answer questions about their experience on PlayStation platforms.

A review stage follows. Applications are assessed and a limited number of candidates are shortlisted.

These finalists move into video interviews. The interviews focus on their gaming background and connection to PlayStation games.

After interviews, one final participant is selected for inclusion in Gran Turismo 7.

That individual is invited to a visual arts studio in Los Angeles for scanning and collaboration work.

The process includes capturing facial and physical likeness data for in-game integration.

The Playerbase first integration in Gran Turismo 7 and in-game fan features



Expansion plans across PlayStation Studios games and future titles



The Playerbase application and eligibility process







Sony Interactive Entertainment has introduced a new community initiative called The Playerbase. The programme is designed to bring selected PlayStation fans into major titles developed by Sony Interactive Entertainment and its studios. It begins with Gran Turismo 7 and is set to expand into other games in the future. Fans will be able to apply for a chance to have their likeness scanned and appear inside PlayStation games in limited in-game roles.The announcement focuses on community participation and long-term fan engagement across PlayStation. The programme is being rolled out in select global markets, including regions across the Americas, Europe, Asia, South Africa, and Australia. Applications open through an official PlayStation website, with account verification required.The Playerbase is a fan participation programme created by Sony Interactive Entertainment. It gives selected players a chance to be included in PlayStation Studios games. The idea is based on scanning real fans and placing them into digital environments.It starts with Gran Turismo 7, where selected individuals appear as in-game character portraits.These appearances are limited-time placements inside the game’s showcase elements. The selected fan also contributes to creative assets such as a custom fantasy logo and a vehicle livery design.The initiative is positioned as a way to bring players closer to development teams within PlayStation Studios. It connects community identity with in-game representation.The first confirmed title for The Playerbase is Gran Turismo 7. The selected fan appears in a special in-game format. This includes a portrait-style representation used within the game’s showcase areas.Alongside the visual appearance, the participant contributes to two additional creative elements. One is a fantasy logo. The other is a custom vehicle livery. These designs are added permanently to the game’s showcase content.The structure is limited in scope. Only one fan is selected for the initial phase. The inclusion is time-bound within gameplay presentation, but some design elements remain as permanent additions.The programme is planned to extend beyond its first title. PlayStation Studios is expected to bring additional games into the initiative over time. Each game may include fans in different ways depending on its design and visual style.No additional titles have been confirmed yet. The rollout remains gradual. Future updates are expected as more studios participate.The concept focuses on expanding player presence across the wider PlayStation ecosystem. Integration methods may vary between games rather than following a single format.Applications for The Playerbase are available through playstation.com/the-playerbase. The programme is open in selected global regions.Participants need a valid PlayStation account. Additional personal information is required during submission. Entry involves answering experience-based questions about gaming history on PlayStation platforms.Shortlisted candidates are contacted for further interviews. Final selection is limited. The programme does not guarantee inclusion for all applicants.The first phase begins with Gran Turismo 7, with expansion expected later. The application window opens at a set global time announced by Sony Interactive Entertainment.
Article Summary: The playerbase is a fan participation programme created by sony interactive entertainment. It gives selected players a chance to be included in playstation studios games. The idea is based on scanning real fans and placing them into digital environments. The first phase begins with gran turismo 7, with expansion expected later.

Article Title: Vaishali Rameshbabu: Three players, one crown: How can India's Vaishali win Women's Candidates at the eleventh hour?
Article Text:
R-L India’s Vaishali Rameshbabu, Kazakhstan's Bibisara Assaubayeva, and China’s Zhu Jiner (Photos by Michal Walusza)

Watch Harika Dronavalli Exclusive: Inside Grenke #chess win, viral no-handshake incident, and more Harika Dronavalli Exclusive: Inside Grenke #chess win, viral no-handshake incident, and more

A tactical deadlock: Analysis of Round 13



The scenarios ahead of final round



ALSO READ:

Women’s Section: Round 13 Results – April 14

Bibisara Assaubayeva 1–0 Anna Muzychuk

Kateryna Lagno 1–0 Divya Deshmukh

Tan Zhongyi 0.5–0.5 Vaishali Rameshbabu

Zhu Jiner 0–1 Aleksandra Goryachkina

Women’s Section: Round 14 Pairings – April 15

Anna Muzychuk vs Zhu Jiner

Aleksandra Goryachkina vs Tan Zhongyi

Vaishali Rameshbabu vs Kateryna Lagno

Divya Deshmukh vs Bibisara Assaubayeva

NEW DELHI: The hour of judgement has arrived. Unless a tie-breaker is forced and we have to wait for another day, it will be decided on Wednesday on the Mediterranean shores of Cyprus who will take the Women’s Candidates crown and challenge China’s Ju Wenjun in the Women’s World Chess Championship match later this year.In the running for the title, there are three contenders: India’s Vaishali Rameshbabu, Kazakhstan's Bibisara Assaubayeva, and China’s Zhu Jiner. Vaishali and Bibisara currently lead with 7.5/13 points, followed by Jiner on 7/13. The math is simple yet somewhat disquieting. If Vaishali and Bibisara both win their final games, they head into a tie-break on Thursday.If Vaishali wins and others drop points, she is the champion. However, if she draws and Bibisara wins, the Kazakh prodigy will take the title, mirroring the feat of her partner Javokhir Sindarov, who secured the Open section with a round to spare on Tuesday. If Vaishali and Bibisara draw and Jiner wins, it will again be an all-China affair in the Women's World Championship match.On Tuesday, all eyes were on Vaishali’s high-stakes clash against former World Champion Tan Zhongyi.While a win would have put the Indian in the driver's seat, the game ended in a hard-fought draw.In his analysis of the round, Grandmaster Pravin Thipsay, speaking to TimesofIndia.com, noted that while Tan has been in poor form with three defeats in the tournament, the game lacked the creative sparks needed to break the stalemate."Vaishali (with black pieces) played the Queen's Gambit Accepted Deferred, a system Praggnanandhaa has also started employing. The game reached a standard position played 70 or 80 years ago," Thipsay observed. "On the eighth move, Tan Zhongyi played a strange move (8... Nge2). The knight belongs on F3; the idea was probably to bring it to G3 and E4, which looks like a theoretical novelty without much merit."Vaishali equalised comfortably, but Thipsay felt she missed opportunities to seize a greater advantage. "By move 12, I would have preferred Black. But Vaishali seemed to get rattled. Instead of taking 12... Nxc4, she developed 12... Bf5 and subsequently retreated the knight from B6 to D7 (with 17... Nd7). It was necessary to capture that bishop earlier."The momentum shifted toward Tan, who missed a golden opportunity on the 26th move (26. Qe2)."Tan didn’t show the courage to take the A6 pawn with the queen. Qxa6 would have led to a reasonably good advantage," Thipsay added. "Instead, she played safeguarding chess and forced a draw. Somewhere, it was not a great game; players did not find the best squares for their bishops or the right moments for exchanges."The leaderboard took a dramatic turn elsewhere as Zhu Jiner, pushing for a win against Aleksandra Goryachkina, blundered and lost. This allowed Bibisara to join Vaishali at the top following her win over Anna Muzychuk."It is a very strange turn of events," Thipsay remarked. "Now, everything depends on the last game. In the final round, Vaishali with the white pieces takes on Russia’s Kateryna Lagno, while Bibisara will be Black against India’s Divya Deshmukh. Both will try to reach 8.5 points."The permutations for Wednesday are complex. "In an extraordinary event where both Vaishali and Bibisara lose, and Zhu Jiner wins against Anna Muzychuk, then even Zhu Jiner could emerge the winner with 8 points," Thipsay told this website.Vaishali stands on the precipice of history. She has the white pieces and the momentum of a leader, but in the Candidates, does she have the nerve to own the stage? Time will tell.
Article Summary: India's vaishali rameshbabu, kazakhstan's bibisara assaubayeva, and china’s zhu jiner are in the running for the title. If they both win their final games, they head into a tie-break on thursday. The winner will take the women's candidates crown and challenge china's ju wenjun in the world chess championship match.

Article Title: Psl: 'No one will say it': Ex-Pakistan cricketer drops truth bomb after Rossouw calls IPL a 'movie' amid PSL debate - Watch
Article Text:
Ahmed Shehzad, IPL trophy

Watch How Pakistan trained after embarrassing defeat to India in Colombo How Pakistan trained after embarrassing defeat to India in Colombo

Former Pakistan cricketer Ahmed Shehzad has criticised Pakistan journalists and media for repeatedly asking foreign players to compare the Indian Premier League (IPL) and the Pakistan Super League ( PSL ).Shehzad pointed to questions asked to Kusal Mendis , who is currently playing in the PSL."Kusal Mendis is playing, performing in PSL, and he is being asked questions like 'sir, last time you left and went to IPL, what do you think about that?' Look at what kind of questions they are asking," Shehzad said.The former Pakistan batter also referred to comments made by Rilee Rossouw , who had described the IPL as a "movie"."Look at Rilee Rossouw — there is no clarity about his performances (in PSL), but he has made statements. And when he was asked about IPL — that what do you think about IPL — so while playing PSL, you obviously cannot praise IPL. So in that, he said, 'Oh, that is a Bollywood movie. The cricket is happening here in PSL,'" Shehzad said, adding that no player would praise the IPL while playing in the PSL.Mendis, who is representing Peshawar Zalmi in PSL 2026, was earlier asked about his decision to leave the PSL last year and join the IPL. A reporter questioned whether he had any “regrets” about joining Gujarat Titans during the season despite being part of Quetta Gladiators.Mendis reacted to the question but did not respond.“Last year, you withdrew from Pakistan Super League to play for Gujarat Titans midway through the tournament. And you showed some security concerns. And now Pakistan Super League (is) giving you respect again and they (Gujarat Titans) did not pick you again. So, (do) you have any regret about withdrawing from Pakistan Super League previous year?” the reporter asked Mendis.Meanwhile, Rossouw, who is also part of the PSL, compared the two leagues and said the IPL feels "more of a movie than actual cricket.""The IPL obviously has the whole Bollywood behind it, so it's a lot more of a movie than actual cricket. So both of them have their pros and cons."
Article Summary: Former pakistan cricketer ahmed shehzad has criticised pakistan journalists and media for repeatedly asking foreign players to compare the indian premier league (ipl) and the pakistan super league ( psl) shehzad pointed to questions asked to kusal mendis, who is currently playing in the psl.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Noor Ahmad’s magic spell sinks KKR as CSK win by 32 runs
Article Text:
CSK vs KKR (BCCI Photo)

:

CSK vs KKR

CHENNAINoor Ahmad was struggling for rhythm in recent times but Chennai Super Kings never lost faith in him. They persisted with playing the left-arm wrist-spinner and the Afghan star delivered on Tuesday at the MA Chidambaram Stadium against a shambolic Kolkata Knight Riders to give CSK their second win on the bounce. Chasing 193 for victory on a pitch where the ball was stopping just a bit, the game was in the balance with KKR skipper Ajinkya Rahane looking to dig in and take the game deep.Rahane (28 off 22 balls) is a fine player of spin, but he couldn’t clear the infield and was caught at mid-off that sparked the collapse. Noor (3-21) removed an off-colour Cameron Green , who didn’t know which way the ball was turning, the next ball. And in his next over, when Noor got ‘finisher’ Rinku Singh caught at the deep, the game was well and truly over. Rovman Powell and Ramandeep Singh tried a bit towards the end, but it was only about making the margin of defeat, 32 in this case, look slightly respectable.While Noor’s spell played a significant part, CSK won both the Powerplays that set up the game for them. While batting, Sanju Samson and No. 3 Ayush Mhatre helped CSK reach 722, which went a long way in helping them reach 192-5. As Sanju (48 off 32 balls) hit a hat-trick of boundaries off medium-pacer Vaibhav Arora, Ayush’s 17-ball 38 was the stand-out batting show of the day.The Mumbai youngster took a heavy toll of Green hitting him for 21 runs in an over and then struck Vaibhav for three consecutive boundaries. He was dismissed by Vaibhav, but he had already done the job.While bowling too, the CSK pacers got it right in the Powerplay as KKR completely messed it up. Khaleel Ahmed and Anshul Kamboj got the ball swinging a bit with the new opening duo of Sunil Narine and Finn Allen struggling to get going. Allen fell to Kamboj while Narine was dismissed by Khaleel, as 36-2 in six overs put immense pressure on KKR.Rahane tried to break free for a bit, taking rookie medium-pacer Gurjapneet Singh for 19 in one over, but that was merely a flash in the pan.
Article Summary: Chennai super kings beat kolkata knight riders by 32 runs. Csk won both the powerplays that set up the game for them. Sanju samson and no. 3 ayush mhatre helped csk reach 722, which went a long way in helping them reach 192-5.

Article Title: Uzbek GM Sindarov wins Candidates 2026, sets up world title clash with Gukesh
Article Text:
Sindarov wins 2026 Candidates (IANS)

In a dominant performance perhaps never seen before at the Candidates chess, Uzbek grandmaster Javokhir Sindarov clinched victory in Cyprus to set up a World Championship match against the current champion, India’s D Gukesh.Winning six of his 13 games and no losses, the 20-year-old drew Dutchman Anish Giri in the 13th round on Tuesday and with that, sealed the Candidates chess tournament in Cyprus with a round to spare. He jumped to 9.5 points and Giri to 7.5. If Gukesh winning the Candidates in 2024 was a shocker, Sindarov in 2026 was all shock and awe. In 2024, Gukesh won, defeating China’s Ding Liren in the 14th and final game of their match.In the previous seven Candidates in this format since 2013, only V Anand (2014) and Ian Nepomniachtchi (2022) had won the event before the last round. Whether Sindarov’s challenge ends with a prize-winning move will be decided in some months from now through a new chapter of Indo-Uzbek rivalry with Gukesh and the new prince are expected to cross cerebral swords.The Gukesh-Sindarov clash will be the ‘youngest world chess championship matchup ever’, with a combined age of 40, breaking the record of Magnus Carlsen vs Swrgey Karjakin in 2016 when both were 26.Sindarov refused to tell the name of the two seconds he is working with remotely saying that can be done after his match with Gukesh. He is coached by IM Roman Vidonyak with GM Mukhiddin Madaminov being his second.Sindarov told the FIDE webcast: “Last week was hard. I could not sleep properly. I wanted to finish in the Top 3 and show that I was not lucky to qualify for this tournament.” Compared to the Indian players who work 10 hours a day, Sindarov said he did not work hard enough after becoming a GM in 2019. “I used to play a lot of Counter-Strike (video game). After quarantine, I started to work hard.”Asked about his preferred choice of the venue for the match against Gukesh, he said, “I don’t want to play the match in cold weather in Uzbekistan. I would like a hot country like Cyprus.”He told the FIDE broadcast that he is very happy that he could finish it before the last round.
Article Summary: Javokhir sindarov wins 2026 candidates chess tournament in cyprus. Uzbek grandmaster will now face india's d gukesh in world championship match. The 20-year-old drew dutchman anish giri in the 13th round on tuesday.

Article Title: Wisden condemns India over ‘Orwellian’ governance and politicisation of cricket
Article Text:
Wisden condemns India over ‘Orwellian’ governance (Screengrab/x)

The 2026 Wisden Cricketers’ Almanack, being published on Thursday, says that the game’s previous USP as a “refuge from realpolitik” has been poisoned by the growing politicisation of the sport under India’s “Orwellian” influence.The “Notes by the Editor” of the 163rd edition of the annual, targets India’s growing political influence over the game, saying,“Cricket has become an important piece on BJP’s geopolitical chessboard”.“Was there a clearer indictment of the game’s governance in 2025 than Pakistan Cricket Board chairman Mohsin Naqvi’s assertion that ‘politics and sport can’t go together’? Presumably he had forgotten he was also his country’s interior minister,” editor Lawrence Booth writes.Booth refers to how the 2025 Men’s Asia Cup , held in the UAE, “descended into tit-for-tat farce, with players on both sides making tasteless gestures about fighter planes, and India refusing to take the stage to receive the trophy from Naqvi”. The Asia Cup was played amidst heightened tensions between India and Pakistan as it was the first time the two were meeting on the cricket field after Operation Sindoor following the Pahalgam massacre by terrorists.India won and refused to shake hands with the Pakistan side.“It was obvious long before this latest grandstanding that the BCCI were the sporting adjunct of India’s ruling BJP,” Booth wrote, adding, “But the relationship became explicit when India captain Suryakumar Yadav dedicated the first of his side’s three Asia Cup wins over Pakistan to the armed forces. And the idea that cricket was now a legitimate proxy for more lethal activity was hammered home on X… The real-world Operation Sindoor had left dozens dead…” Booth wrote. “Now it was being equated with a game of T20.”Booth lamented that the game’s governance “grows ever more Orwellian, pretending that Indian exceptionalism comes without consequence”. He also wrote that the decision by Kolkata Knight Riders to release Mustafizur Rahman “confirmed cricket’s descent into the hands of its political masters”.
Article Summary: Wisden condemns india over ‘orwellian’ governance. 2026 wisden cricketers’ almanack, being published on thursday, says that the game’s previous usp as a “refuge from realpolitik’ has been poisoned by the growing politicisation of the sport.
